description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or working. The desk has four straight legs and a modesty panel that spans the width between the front legs, providing structural support and privacy. On the right side beneath the tabletop, there is a single pull-out drawer with a small metallic handle, ideal for storing stationery or small items. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving the desk a classic and professional appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a minimalist design. This desk would fit well in both modern and traditional urban office or study environments.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with a flat top, modesty panel, and a single right-side drawer. It has a classic, sturdy design with visible wood grain and a metallic drawer handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the modesty panel and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the desk's front.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the desk's depth and the thickness of the tabletop, with the legs and support bars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the drawer on the right side and the modesty panel, with the handle clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's length and the absence of drawers or additional features on this side.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and modesty panel is intended to face the user, with the drawer on the user's right and the open leg space beneath the tabletop.
